abilities.name: Houndblade Charge
abilities.text: When Kira commits to a close fight, the first step is already a warning growl and the second is steel.

abilities.name: Loyal Guard
abilities.text: Kira is hardest to break when holding the line for someone else.

abilities.name: Ash-Scent Tracker
abilities.text: Fresh danger leaves a trail in the smoke, and Kira knows which footprints are lying.

abilities.name: Heroic Bite
abilities.text: When a wounded enemy thinks the duel is over, Kira reminds it that a sword is not the only weapon in reach.
